rationale: The cited paper studies political debate Twitter dynamics (during vs. after debates, retweet drivers), while the citing paper focuses on movie marketing effects of firm-generated content on UGC and box-office sales using panel/2SLS models. In the provided evidence, there is only a bare DOI-matched reference entry and no citation-context text or note indicating that this specific paper supplies a core theory, method, or benchmark for the movie study. This looks most consistent with an incidental/background mention rather than substantive use.
